title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis argues that humanity is entering the foothills of the singularity, with AI agents already performing coding, research, planning, and scientific work at speeds that compress days into minutes. The commentary reflects a debate about whether imperfect but increasingly useful AI systems represent meaningful progress toward AGI.
